title: Deliciously Savory Polish Pork Skillet
description: A sweet and savory Polish dish featuring minced garlic and score-fat, perfect for a low-carb meal prep option. This recipe is a hearty and flavorful skillet dish.
instructions: Heat the score-fat in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground pork and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the onion and mushrooms and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
